# mode

**Instance Property**

The display mode used by the device view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var mode: IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

The possible constants are described in [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKScannerDeviceViewDisplayMode].

## Setting the Device View’s Display Mode

- **hasDisplayModeAdvanced**: The property that determines whether the scanner view uses the advanced display mode.
- **hasDisplayModeSimple**: The property that determines whether the scanner view uses the simple display mode.
